text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's name travels far as<n>her exploits
fill the audience of the<n>Hopeful Stakes with
wonder after she<n>has a successful run.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is the first race in the<n>Triple Crown
tour.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's fighting spirit burns<n>brightly as we
head down the path of<n>the Satsuki Sho!
